name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Toshiba Ac
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a Toshiba AC infrared remote code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Rc Code 1
config_entries.description: The remote control code to send, see dumper output for more details.

config_entries.label: Rc Code 2
config_entries.description: The secondary remote control code to send; some codes are sent in two parts.
